original_question:
If $f(x)$ and $g(x)$ are polynomials such that $f(x) + g(x) = 4x^2 + x - 1,$ then what is $g(x)$ if $f(x) = x^4 - 3x^2 - x + 5$?

Present the answer in LaTex format: \boxed{Your answer}
